paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65 as of 2026-07-21, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news items in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView and "Why Did FRMI Stock Tumble More Than 28% In After-Hours Trading Today?" from Stocktwits, with the latter mentioning the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer as of April 17, 2026.

There have been various SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as filings related to the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031, with total net proceeds of approximately $416.81 million.
